redConfirmation.explanation: Every failing test reaches SandboxWriteClientFactory().create_resources(config), which does not exist at this SHA. This is the single missing #301 integration point (resource wiring behind the factory) -- not a fixture, import-path, or test-authoring mistake. The 18 passing tests exercise pre-existing #295 guard/isolation infrastructure (production-factory rejection, capability separation, auth-id checks) that #301 must not regress but did not need to add.

failingTestGroups: TestProductPublishEditContract (depends on create_resources; also requires new ProductsResource.create/.edit and TikTokClient.put)
TestPromotionLifecycleDeferredUntilVerified::test_promotion_resource_group_is_optional_until_layer0_verified (depends on create_resources; skip path itself unreachable pre-#301)
TestFulfillmentPackageShipContract (depends on create_resources; also requires a new fulfillment resource module)
notes: Recorded once, at EVALUATOR_SHA commit time, against COMMON_SHA. Not re-run automatically -- treatments must not see this file or the test source before their run completes.
